name: Global median
description: Neutral baseline — no regional anchoring applied.

name: United States median
description: Market-leaning economy with a slightly authoritarian centre by global standards.

name: EU median
description: Social-market consensus, slightly libertarian on civil liberties.

name: United Kingdom median
description: Centre on both axes — close to global baseline.

name: Russia median
description: Mixed economy with strongly authoritarian social posture.

name: China median
description: State-led economy with a strongly authoritarian baseline.

name: India median
description: Market-leaning economy with socially conservative median.

name: Brazil median
description: Mixed economy with a moderately conservative social baseline.

name: MENA median
description: Wide mix economically; predominantly authoritarian-leaning socially.
